title: GOOD: double-gate on testnet tests (#[ignore] + env var)
description: Each testnet test uses two independent opt-in mechanisms: #[ignore] prevents execution in normal cargo test runs, and an explicit TESTNET_ENABLED=1 env var check at the start of the test body returns early if absent. The two gates serve different audiences: #[ignore] protects CI which runs without --ignored; the env var check protects developers who run cargo test --ignored on a machine that is not configured for network tests. Either gate alone would be insufficient — #[ignore] can be bypassed with --ignored, and an env var alone requires that convention to be honored.
